mapper.select: select * from scheduled_jobs order by created_at desc, id desc limit #{limit} offset #{offset}
mapper.update: update scheduled_jobs set cron_expression = #{cronExpression}, parameters = #{parameters}, enabled = #{enabled}, updated_at = current_timestamp where id = #{id}
update scheduled_jobs set enabled = #{enabled}, updated_at = current_timestamp where id = #{id}
update scheduled_jobs set last_run_at = current_timestamp, updated_at = current_timestamp where id = #{id}
mapper.insert: insert into scheduled_job_logs (job_id, job_name, handler_name, status) values (#{jobId}, #{jobName}, #{handlerName}, #{status})
mapper.select: select count(*) from scheduled_job_logs where job_id = #{jobId}
